title: Delete Saved Audiences
content:
Use this endpoint to delete Saved Audiences. > **Note**
If you have already applied a Saved Audience to an ad group, then you can only delete the Saved Audience when the ad group has been deleted. ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type
Allowed format: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string|Advertiser ID.| |saved_audience_ids {Required}|string[]|IDs of Saved Audiences that you want to delete.
Max size = 100.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/saved_audience/delete/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "saved_audience_ids": [ "{{saved_audience_id}}" ] }' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |request_id |string| The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data |object|Returned data. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": {} } (/code) ```
